title: Construction Site Safety Briefing
scenario: Create a safety briefing for a construction site. The briefing should include a list of emergency contacts, a description of potential hazards, and guidelines for personal protective equipment (PPE) use. The briefing should be written in a clear and concise manner, free of jargon, and should be targeted towards construction workers with varying levels of experience. The briefing should be no more than 250 words and use headings to separate sections.
constraints: Must be no more than 250 words
Must use headings to separate sections

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the briefing adheres to the word count and section separation constraints.
Check if the briefing is written in a clear and concise manner, free of jargon.
Check if the briefing includes accurate and relevant information about emergency contacts, potential hazards, and PPE use.
